estimations.average: The average estimation of all users is:

confirm.label: Confirm reveal
confirm.description: Not all users have voted yet. Are you sure to reveal the votes anyway?

settings.headline: GitHub settings
settings.description: Please enter the required details we need to load issues from your GitHub repository.

hero.description: An story estimation tool build for agile teams to plan and estimate their sprints. Create a new session, connect it to your GitHub repository and invite your team members to get started.

create.description: Create a new planning session here so your team members can join to estimate tasks.
create.headline: Create new planning session

sessions.empty: You don't have any sessions yet. Create a new one or join an existing session above.

join.description: Do you want to join an existing planning session? Then just enter the planning code below!
join.headline: Join session

sessions.notFound: Session not found or you don't have access to it.

create.error: Error while creating new planning session

source.description: Please select the source that you want to use for your stories.
source.headline: Story source

github.headline: GitHub
github.description: Available issues will be loaded from a public GitHub repository that you can then choose from.

other.headline: Need another source?
other.description: Your story source is not listed here? You can create a feature request so we can consider integrating it.
